topic: Systematizing the Orchestration of AI in Software Development — A Meta-Architectural Framework
content_preview: Academic-style report on the AI-conductor paradigm: epistemology of software as rhetoric (Kenneth Burke, literate programming, poetic computation), enterprise governance for eight-organ architecture (GitHub Enterprise Cloud, SCIM, custom properties, rulesets), deterministic SDLC guardrails (branching, CI/CD, testing, IaC), multi-agent orchestration via MCP/A2A protocols, and productization pathways.
